channel.title: The Mood Room
channel.description: Upcoming events for The Mood Room

item.title: Industry Night
item.description:
Tuesday, June 30, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

Calling all restaurant & bar staff — 50% off all night just for you!Come through every Tuesday, 9 PM–2 AM, grab a drink, and vibe with the industry fam. You’ve earned it.

Event details

item.title: Game & Steak Night Wednesdays
item.description:
Wednesday, July 1, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

Game on, good times guaranteed. Every Wednesday.

Event details

item.title: Open Mic Comedy
item.description:
Thursday, July 2, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

Get ready for The Mood Room's Open Mic Comedy Night, happening every Thursday, hosted by comedian Blake Jones and sponsored by HoneySuckle Brand!

Event details

item.title: Rose Frequency
item.description:
Friday, July 3, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

Rose Frequency is not a party. It’s a feeling you move through.An intentional DJ experience curated for connection, release, and rhythm. No rush. No chaos. Just sound meeting the body where it already is.

Event details

item.title: Closed for 4th of July
item.description:
Saturday, July 4, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

Event details

item.title: Breaking Sound Houston
item.description:
Friday, July 10, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

We showcase the hottest emerging artists & bands in premium locations around the city. #BreakingSoundHouston

Event details

item.title: Closed for Private Party
item.description:
Saturday, July 11, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

Event details

item.title: Candela - All Vinyl Latin Night
item.description:
Saturday, July 11, 2026 at 8:30 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

Join us on the first Saturday of every month for a night of all vinyl salsa, merengue, Bachata, plena y más! Come as you are and get ready to dance, Houston!

Event details

item.description:

item.title: Vinyl Friday
item.description:
Friday, July 24, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

All vinyl throwback event! Join us for FREE on the 4th Friday of every month with special guests DJs all night from Jamz713.
